data.narrative: Updated the existing Module 7 adaptation plan twice to absorb company accounts and role-based access, while preserving progress and keeping the demo scope focused.

dimension_scores.observation: The student unpacked the Meridian request into company accounts, delegation, roles, and department visibility.
dimension_scores.evidence: Created artifacts/adaptation/module-07-change-update.md with the updated role-based access model.

dimension_scores.observation: The student revised the blast radius and plan when the second requirement arrived, preserving the existing build where possible.
dimension_scores.evidence: Updated artifacts/adaptation/module-07-change-update.md and module-07-fix-notes.md to show layered changes.

dimension_scores.observation: The student identified the risk of the role logic taking extra time and flagged the department-head view as potentially deferred.
The revised plan specified which tickets were preserved, modified, cut, and added with clear estimates.
The student updated the plan twice under changing requirements instead of starting over.
dimension_scores.evidence: Created module-07-change-update.md and module-07-fix-notes.md to capture three plan versions.

dimension_scores.observation: The student reasoned about where roles belong in the data model and how booking endpoints enforce permissions.
dimension_scores.evidence: Detailed authorization and model notes in artifacts/adaptation/module-07-fix-notes.md.

strengths: Preserved the original build while evolving the plan through two requirement changes.
growth_areas: Continue turning edited plans into executable backlog items with more precise acceptance criteria.
data.recommendation: Begin Module 8 with a shared contract or schema for the updated booking and role-based access APIs to avoid drift during integration.

public_evidence.student_action: Revised the Module 7 plan to include role-based access and department visibility while preserving previous work.
public_evidence.technical_detail: Updated the company account adaptation plan and scope after Meridian added role requirements.
public_evidence.reviewer_value: Shows the ability to adjust scope and maintain a coherent plan under changing requirements.

concepts_demonstrated.evidence: Outlined manager, employee, and department head permissions in module-07-fix-notes.md.
Updated the Module 7 blast radius analysis to reflect the second change.

teaching_approaches.detail: Layered a second requirement on top of an existing adaptation plan.
